title: Touhou Death Sound
description: A resource pack that replaces the player death sound with the death sound from the Touhou Project series (aka the "pichuun" sound).
body:
Ever want to have violent flashbacks to failing a lunatic mode run of Imperishable Night for the 500th time? Or just think the funny flying anime girl game has a funny death noise? If yes to either of these, or for any other reason, then you've found the resource pack for you. 

All this does is replace the player death sound with the death sound from the Touhou series. Nothing more, nothing less.

Enjoy!

_The Touhou Project and all assets taken from the Touhou Project belongs to Team Shanghai Alice._
